intro: Alarms blare across the plant floor. The reactor core has overloaded, and the crackling energy has woken something that now guards it, sparking with raw current.
title: Overcharge the Core
description: The power plant's core has overcharged and its Electric guardian surges to life. Best it in battle - a powerful multi-bar boss, several levels above your strongest Pokemon - for a guaranteed high-tier reward and a Relic. Or pull the breaker and leave.

1.label: Face the guardian
1.tooltip:
(+) Win for a guaranteed high-tier reward + a Relic
(?) A tough multi-bar boss, above your level
1.selected: Sparks arc across the floor as the overcharged guardian rounds on you!

2.label: Pull the breaker
2.selected: You throw the breaker, and the guardian sputters back into dormancy.
